title: triticum bifarium
intro: Triticum bifarium, also known as two-horned wheat or wild wheat, is a species of wild wheat native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Triticum bifarium include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for digestive issues and skin conditions. Triticum bifarium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and creams for topical application.
